summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Self-Service Portal and Mobile-Responsive improvements. All 18 test cases passed. Backend APIs 100% functional, Frontend UI fully operational with all workflows tested.
passed_tests: 1. Login as employee (john.doe@acmecorp.com / employee123) - 'My Profile' appears in sidebar ✓
2. Navigate to /profile - header card shows name (John Doe), designation (Software Developer), department (Engineering), employee code (EMPDB549405), state badge (CA) ✓
3. Profile tab: Personal info displays correctly - Phone, Address, Emergency Contact, State (Tax) ✓
4. Profile tab: Edit button makes all 4 fields editable (phone, address, emergency_contact inputs and state dropdown) ✓
5. Profile tab: Change phone to '(415) 555-9999', Save - success toast appears and updated value persists ✓
6. Profile tab: Read-only fields displayed - Email (john.doe@acmecorp.com), Department (Engineering), Date of Joining (January 15, 2026) ✓
7. Attendance tab: Attendance History table with Date, Clock In, Clock Out, Hours columns ✓
8. Leaves tab: Leave balance cards (Casual: 10, Sick: 12, Privilege: 15) and Leave History table with approved CL leave ✓
9. Payroll tab: Pay Stubs table with Period, Gross, Deductions, Net Pay columns - 3 records (Jun/Apr/Mar 2026) ✓
10. Payroll tab: PDF button clicked - no JS errors, download triggers ✓
11. Backend API: GET /api/profile returns employee data with phone, address, state_code fields ✓
12. Backend API: PUT /api/profile with {phone:'(555) 123-4567'} updates successfully ✓
13. Backend API: GET /api/profile/history returns attendance, leaves, payrolls arrays ✓
14. Mobile viewport (390x844): Login page renders correctly without horizontal overflow ✓
15. Mobile viewport: Dashboard page stat cards stack vertically, attendance card wraps ✓
16. Mobile viewport: Hamburger menu button visible at top-left, opens sidebar overlay ✓
17. Mobile viewport: Calendar page grid fits within viewport ✓
18. Login page: Google sign-in button NOT present (removed per user request) ✓
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Self-Service Portal fully tested. Profile page has 4 tabs (Profile, Attendance, Leaves, Payroll). Profile tab allows editing phone, address, emergency_contact, and state_code. Mobile responsive design working correctly with hamburger menu at 390x844 viewport. Google sign-in removed from login page. All data-testid attributes present: tab-profile, tab-attendance, tab-leaves, tab-payroll, edit-profile-btn, save-profile-btn, mobile-menu-toggle, nav-my-profile.

profile_page.header_card: Shows name, designation, department, employee code, state badge
profile_page.profile_tab: Editable fields: phone, address, emergency_contact, state dropdown
profile_page.attendance_tab: Table with Date, Clock In, Clock Out, Hours columns
profile_page.leaves_tab: Leave balance cards (Casual/Sick/Privilege) + Leave History table
profile_page.payroll_tab: Pay Stubs table with Period, Gross, Deductions, Net Pay, PDF button

employee_self_service_portal.sidebar_nav: 'My Profile' nav item visible for employee role
employee_self_service_portal.edit_save_flow: Edit button → fields editable → Save → success toast → values persist

mobile_responsive.dashboard: Stat cards stack vertically, attendance card wraps

backend_apis.GET /api/profile: Returns employee data with phone, address, state_code
backend_apis.GET /api/profile/history: Returns attendance, leaves, payrolls arrays + leave_balance

login_page.google_signin_removed: No Google button or 'Or continue with' divider
